subcodes.first_line: O man of the arena of the Covenant! As the Lord God hath bestowed His glorious grace and the mighty flood [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مرد میدان پیمان حضرت پروردگار چون فیض جلیل ارزان فرمود و سیل عظیم
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
